an5.106:1.0.2: "(1) Bhante, in what way can a bhikkhu dwell at ease while living in the Saṅgha?"
an5.106:1.0.3: (2) "But, Bhante, might there be another way by which a bhikkhu can dwell at ease while living in the Saṅgha?"
an5.106:1.0.4: (3) "But, Bhante, might there be another way by which a bhikkhu can dwell at ease while living in the Saṅgha?"
an5.106:1.0.5: (4) "But, Bhante, might there be another way by which a bhikkhu can dwell at ease while living in the Saṅgha?"
an5.106:1.0.6: (5) "But, Bhante, might there be another way by which a bhikkhu can dwell at ease while living in the Saṅgha?"
an5.106:1.0.7: And, Ānanda, I say there is no other way of dwelling at ease more excellent or sublime than this."
